description: UK digital health company offering AI-powered symptom checker, GP video consultations, and healthcare monitoring. Significant NHS partnerships and global expansion. Financially distressed but technologically advanced.
business_model: B2B2C - NHS partnerships, insurer partnerships, B2C subscriptions
key_investors: Public markets; formerly backed by Kinnevik, Vostok New Ventures
competitive_advantage: Advanced AI, global footprint (though shrinking), NHS track record

varden_fit.rationale: Distressed asset - potential opportunity to acquire talent or technology at discount
